name: NeuralMesh Evolution Trigger
description: Triggers an evolution cycle for a NeuralMesh agent when the training buffer threshold is reached. Notifies the evolution agent via AXL, bumps the ENS neural-version text record, and broadcasts the event to the mesh.

agentName.description: ENS name of the agent to evolve (e.g. researcher.neuralmesh.eth)

taskCount.description: Number of completed tasks that triggered this evolution

evolutionPubkey.description: AXL public key of the evolution agent. Get it from: curl http://localhost:9042/api/self | jq .pubkey

config.code: return { agentName: '{{@trigger:Trigger.agentName}}', taskCount: {{@trigger:Trigger.taskCount}}, fromVersion: '{{@trigger:Trigger.fromVersion}}', triggeredAt: Date.now(), notified: {{@notify-evolution-agent:HttpRequest.success}} };
